visual_findings.label: Facial Expression
visual_findings.summary: Neutral to slightly downward gaze; minimal emotional expression; occasional blinking and head movement.
visual_findings.evidence: Patient maintains direct gaze at camera for most of the clip, with occasional downward glances. Facial muscles appear relaxed without signs of distress, confusion, or agitation.

visual_findings.label: Body Posture
visual_findings.summary: Sitting upright, one hand resting near neck/shoulder; no signs of fidgeting or disorientation.
visual_findings.evidence: Patient’s posture remains stable throughout. No visible signs of physical discomfort or unsteady balance.

voice_findings.label: Speech Fluency
voice_findings.summary: Speech is fluent, with normal rate and rhythm; no pauses, repetitions, or word-finding difficulties observed.
voice_findings.evidence: Patient speaks continuously without hesitation or disfluency. No evidence of circumlocution or phonemic errors.

voice_findings.label: Vocal Tone and Pitch
voice_findings.summary: Vocal tone is steady and even; pitch remains within normal range for adult male speaker.
voice_findings.evidence: No vocal tremor, monotony, or excessive pitch variation observed.

content_findings.label: Self-Reported Routine
content_findings.summary: Patient describes daily routine (breakfast, work, lunch) in a coherent, sequential manner without indication of memory deficit.
content_findings.evidence: Patient states: 'In the morning I wake up and have my breakfast and later I start working... I ordered takeout and have my lunch... I prepare them all by myself.' No contradictions or omissions observed.

content_findings.label: Language Comprehension
content_findings.summary: Patient demonstrates appropriate vocabulary and syntax for describing daily activities.
content_findings.evidence: No evidence of semantic errors, paraphasias, or anomia. Sentence structure is grammatically correct and contextually appropriate.

screening_summary: The patient demonstrates coherent speech, appropriate facial expression, stable posture, and clear self-report of daily routine without signs of cognitive impairment. No observable indicators of memory, language, or executive dysfunction are present in this clip.
evidence_against_risk: No speech disfluencies or word-finding difficulties.
No signs of confusion, disorientation, or emotional dysregulation.
Self-reported routine is logically sequenced and complete.
alternative_explanations: The patient may be well-rested or in a familiar environment, which could contribute to optimal performance.
The clip duration may be insufficient to capture episodic memory or complex executive function tasks.
emotional_assessment_findings: Neutral affect; no signs of anxiety, frustration, or apathy observed.
Engagement appears consistent with a standard interview setting; no signs of disengagement or emotional flattening.
risk_control_suggestions: Consider routine follow-up if additional concerns arise in future assessments.
visit_recommendation: Routine follow-up or no further action at this time.
future_risk_trend_summary: Insufficient data to predict future cognitive decline from a single clip.
context_notes: Clip is usable with clear visual focus on the target patient.
No evidence of caregiver or interviewer dominance.
Speech is intelligible and in English with no language mismatch.
disclaimer: Research demo only. This output is not a diagnosis and must not be used as a standalone medical decision.
